title: Who Has Not Found The Heaven Below
content:
Who has not found the heaven below
    Will fail of it above.
    God's residence is next to mine,
    His furniture is love.
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Who Has Not Found The Heaven Below"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
